theme_and_archetype.archetype: Archetype 3: Pastel & Soft mixed with Vibrant Play
theme_and_archetype.reasoning: A Gen Z student super-app needs to be optimistic, tactile, and highly approachable. The light theme with vibrant pastel accents reduces cognitive load while studying, and dynamic domains keep the experience engaging.

headings.usage: Use for all H1, H2, H3, card titles, and numbers/balances. Tight tracking (tracking-tight) is mandatory for headings above text-2xl.

body.usage: Use for all paragraph text, input fields, labels, and small UI text. Clean and extremely legible.

spacing_and_layout.desktop_container: Flex center on desktop with gray background (bg-slate-100).
spacing_and_layout.mobile_frame: relative mx-auto w-full max-w-[400px] h-[850px] bg-white rounded-[40px] border-[12px] border-slate-900 shadow-2xl overflow-hidden flex flex-col
spacing_and_layout.cards: bg-white rounded-2xl p-5 shadow-sm border border-slate-100 mb-4 transition-all hover:shadow-md
spacing_and_layout.bottom_nav: absolute bottom-0 w-full h-16 bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-md border-t border-slate-100 flex items-center justify-around z-50 pb-safe

components.domain_switcher: Horizontal scrollable flex row (gap-2) of pills. Active pill takes the domain's primary color as background, white text. Inactive pill: bg-slate-100 text-slate-600.
components.mood_selector: Row of 5 emoji buttons. Active state adds a 2px ring of the domain color and slightly scales up the emoji (transform scale-110).
components.sliders: Custom styled range input. The track fill color must match the active domain's primary color.
components.circular_ring: SVG circle with stroke-dasharray. Use Recharts PieChart or custom SVG. Stroke color = domain primary.
components.charts: Use Recharts. Use the active domain color for the bars/lines. For radar chart, use helper purple gradient fill.
components.chat_bubbles: User: domain primary bg, white text, rounded-2xl rounded-tr-sm. AI: bg-slate-100, text-slate-900, rounded-2xl rounded-tl-sm.
components.buttons: rounded-xl font-medium px-4 py-3 active:scale-95 transition-transform

testing_attributes.rule: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.

finance_mascot_owl.description: Cute brown and white owl. Use in Finance Buddy hero or zero-state.

wellness_mascot_cloud.description: Fluffy cloud. Use in Wellness Buddy header or sleep/routine sections.

discover_mascot_compass.description: Compass decor. Use in Discover Buddy header or map/activities section.

lifestyle_study.description: College student studying. Use in Helper Buddy or Discover goals.

snack_flatlay.description: Snack flatlay. Use in Discover Buddy food/snacks feature.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Buttons and cards should lift slightly (-translate-y-0.5) and increase shadow on hover.
motion_and_interactions.active_states: Buttons must scale down to 95% on click (active:scale-95) for tactile feedback.
motion_and_interactions.transitions: Use 'transition-all duration-200 ease-out' for color and layout shifts when changing domains.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install Google Fonts for Outfit and Plus Jakarta Sans. Do NOT use Inter.
Install lucide-react or phosphor-icons for tab and UI icons.
Use Recharts for the weekly bar charts and radial life-balance radar chart.
Setup a 'ThemeProvider' or domain state context to dynamically update CSS variables or Tailwind classes based on the active tab (Daily, Finance, Wellness, Discover, Helper).
Build a primary wrapper that acts as a phone frame on desktop screens (max-width: 400px, border-radius, overflow-hidden) and full width on mobile.
Ensure all interactive components have a proper data-testid attribute in kebab-case format.
Use standard JS and JSX files (.js/.jsx), NO TypeScript (.ts/.tsx) files.
